_comment: forward_reply_done + forward_reply_done_text: menu-style mirror_forward_queue.py only (no --store/--url/--all-stores on cmdline); one Discord reply after a batch when no newer Mirror messages exist after the last completed deal. routes: destination_channel_id = <#id> in the !m line. Default command is !m lead. Optional per-route "command": "hdnation" forces !m hdnation (SKU-only); hd-clearance stock uses default lead like homedepot. command_post_channel_id = where the script POSTs the line. Optional: "forward_delay_random_minutes": "1-2" or [1,2] for mirror_forward_queue.py when --delay-random-minutes not passed. post_confirmation: timeout_seconds (lead), timeout_seconds_hdnation (only if a route uses hdnation). forward_all_stores_order: mirror_label strings for mirror_forward_queue.py --all-stores (remaining routes append sorted by label). Checkpoints are stored per Mirror channel under mirror_forward_checkpoint.json by_channel.

post_confirmation.success_substrings: nationwide stock check, lead has been posted
post_confirmation.failure_substrings: could not fetch stock, check you have entered the correct sku
post_confirmation._comment_maintenance: If Tempo/monitor is updating, the bot posts 'being updated' then later 'has been updated'. These needles extend the wait window instead of timing out.
post_confirmation.maintenance_start_substrings: is being updated, will be back in

1484118129402450041._comment: Mirror HD clearance feed (e.g. Deal Soldier); … homedepot <inventory blurb> <#dest> lead_after_dest_suffix (Y).
1484118129402450041.lead_trailing_template: Current inventory is showing around {inventory}. Definitely worth checking your nearby stores to see if any units are available. Grabbing one or two could be worthwhile.
